class.name: GDKGameUI
class.brief_description: System UI service accessed via GDK.game_ui.
class.description: Wraps PC-supported GDK system UI surfaces such as message dialogs, notification position hints, player profile card UI, and player picker UI. Async calls return one-shot completion [Signal] values that emit a [GDKResult].

method.name: show_message_dialog_async
method.description: Shows a system message dialog. [param default_button] and [param cancel_button] accept [code]first[/code]/[code]0[/code], [code]second[/code]/[code]1[/code], or [code]third[/code]/[code]2[/code]. Validation failures return [code]invalid_title[/code], [code]invalid_message[/code], [code]invalid_button_label[/code], [code]invalid_default_button[/code], [code]invalid_cancel_button[/code], or [code]invalid_button_layout[/code]. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly; on success, [code]GDKResult.data[/code] contains [code]selected_button[/code] and [code]selected_button_index[/code].

method.name: set_notification_position_hint
method.description: Sets the preferred notification position hint. [param position] must be one of [code]bottom_center[/code], [code]bottom_left[/code], [code]bottom_right[/code], [code]top_center[/code], [code]top_left[/code], or [code]top_right[/code].

method.name: show_player_profile_card_async
method.description: Shows the profile card UI for the [param target_xuid], requested by [param requesting_user].

method.name: show_player_picker_async
method.description: Shows player picker UI for [param requesting_user]. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly; on success, [code]GDKResult.data[/code] includes [code]selected_xuids[/code] and [code]selection_count[/code].

method.name: resolve_privilege_with_ui_async
method.description: Shows privilege-resolution UI for [param user] and [param privilege]. This forwards to the existing users-service privilege-remediation flow.
